case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. VICTOR MANUEL MORALES TORRES

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-31-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT VICTOR MANUEL MORALES TORRES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, VICTOR MANUEL MORALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-31-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TORRES, VICTOR MANUEL MORALES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $50.00) SERVED APR-13-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TORRES, VICTOR MANUEL MORALES
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY OPORTUN INC.
